artifact_construction: experiment_real_full_results.parquet plus a separately executed TimesFM run on verified-identical window keys

metric_caveats.timesfm_coverage_95: unsupported: q0.1-q0.9 was historically clamped and mislabeled as a 95% interval; do not interpret this column
metric_caveats.pit_values: archived ordinary empirical PIT; invalid for tied discrete counts and not used in final claims
metric_caveats.primary_baseline_sampling: residual bootstrap draws were unseeded in this archived run; current code uses deterministic per-forecast seeds
